commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You did cause judgment to be heard from heaven; the earth feared, and was still, Heard. Some editions of the Septuagint read, "thou hast darted judgment. Augustine) Still. All were filled with astonishment, and Sennacherib was glad to escape in the most private manner. (Calmet) Persecutors will all be terrified when the signs of judgment begin to appear in heaven, which are here represented as past, on account of their certainty. (Worthington) The divine power will be again displayed. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
